etymology.description: 小(小) (xiǎo, "small") + 時候(時候) (shíhou, "time; moment") indicates a period of life marked by small size or youth. "Childhood" conveys the idea of the time when one is small in stature and age.
etymology.interpretation: 小(小) (xiǎo, "small") refers to being young, as children are smaller in size. 時候(時候) (shíhou, "time; moment") points to a specific period. Together, 小時候 (xiǎoshíhou) intuitively refers to the 'time of being small,' signifying childhood when individuals are young and growing.

examples.chinese: 我小时候常常去爷爷家玩(我小時候常常去爺爺家玩)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎoshíhou chángcháng qù yéye jiā wán.
examples.english: I often went to my grandpa's house to play during my childhood.

examples.chinese: 小时候的回忆总是很美好(小時候的回憶總是很美好)。
examples.pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou de huíyì zǒng shì hěn měihǎo.
examples.english: Memories of childhood are always very beautiful.

examples.chinese: 他小时候特别喜欢看书(他小時候特別喜歡看書)，现在也不例外(現在也不例外)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhou tèbié xǐhuan kànshū, xiànzài yě bù lìwài.
examples.english: He especially liked reading during his childhood, and it's still the same now.
